h2: One platform for your entire car wash operation.
bodySnippet: One platform for your entire car wash operation. Revenue intelligence, CRM, marketing, and operations — unified across every location. Command Center Revenue, members, and uptime across every location in real time. CRM & Members Unified customer records, membership tiers, and support history. Operational Intelligence Connected analytics, marketing, and workflows across all sites. v26.0628.001 Welcome back Sign in to your WashCentral account.
